task_description: Convert MSM Supermarket customer and delivery-partner mobile experience to a production-grade Flutter app while retaining the existing Next.js 15 backend and web admin portal. Includes versioned mobile API, bearer token auth, FCM push for delivery alerts, and comprehensive documentation.

verification.summary: All validation passes. Backend: npm build succeeds, 37/38 tests pass (1 pre-existing). Flutter: 80/80 tests pass, analyze clean, APK debug build succeeds. 195 files, ~20K lines across 9 commits. Semantic review v3 APPROVED.

review.remaining_notes: 2 non-blocking design smells: (1) AuthRepository uses full URLs masking dead BaseOptions.baseUrl config, (2) FCM fcmSent flag fire-and-forget in serverless.
